title: Koprivnica、Koprivnica-Križevci — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Koprivnica、Koprivnica-Križevciの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KoprivnicaはKoprivnica-Križevciにある人口30,000の都市です。A city in northern Croatia, known for the Podravka food company, the Koprivnica Museum, and the nearby Đurđevački pijesci sand dunes nature reserve.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
